subject: What happens if the Birds turmoil a 4th time?

posts.body: Hi, what happens if you're particularly unlucky/inept as the birds and go into turmoil a 4th time? Do you shuffle the Ruler cards and draw on at random or what?
You get your whole ruler deck back and can pick any one you want.
Indeed, this can be found in section 7.7.3.I of the rule book.
Even the one you just had ?

dcpepp wrote:

You get your whole ruler deck back and can pick any one you want. 

Not that it matters much at that point. 🤣

Tpatts1 wrote:

Hi, what happens if you're particularly unlucky/inept as the birds and go into turmoil a 4th time? Do you shuffle the Ruler cards and draw on at random or what?

You lie on the floor in the fetal position, sobbing quietly.

LionPacifique wrote:

Tpatts1 wrote:

Hi, what happens if you're particularly unlucky/inept as the birds and go into turmoil a 4th time? Do you shuffle the Ruler cards and draw on at random or what?

You lie on the floor in the fetal position, sobbing quietly.

Actually, most times I've had this happen is when I had all my Roosts out so couldn't place another or couldn't Recruit because I had no warriors in the supply.

By the time you get in such a position and then proceed to turmoil FOUR TIMES you've probably already won the game for 3 turns
